titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 1, no. 49: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 49. (A.R. No. 82 of 1896.) SUCHĪNDIRAM, KANYAKUMARI TALUK, KANYAKUMARI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a boulder in the Sthāṇunātha temple.

p.hi: M.K. Parakēsarivarman (Parāntaka I) Year 40: Kumbha, (Jan-Feb): 947 A.D.

summary.p: Records that Oruṁgai Araṅgaṉ, a merchant of Karavandapuram in Kaḷakkuḍināḍu donated a lamp-stand weighing thirty palam and seventy-five sheep for burning a perpetual lamp to the god of Tiruchchivindiram with one and half uḻakku of ghee daily. Further he donated twenty-five sheep for burning another perpetual lamp at Tiruvēṅkaṭanilai with one āḻākku of ghee daily. These 100 sheep (75+25) were entrusted to the paraḍaichchavaiyār (parishad-sabhā-temple assembly).
Published in E.P. Ind., vol. V p. 43.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . matiraiyum Īḻamumkoṇṭa kop
parakecarivaṉmarkku yāṇṭu nāṟpatu I
vvāṇṭu kumpanāyiṟṟut tirucci
vintirattu Emperumāṉukkuk kaḷak
kuṭi nāṭṭuk karavantapurattu viyāpāri Oru
ṅkai AramkaṉRead araṅkaṉvaitta tirunontā viḷakku O
ṉṟu niṟai pulattuRead palattumuppatu Itu nicatam
Uḻakkarai ney muṭṭāmal pakalum Iravum
cantirātittavaṟ Erivatāka viṭṭa cāvāmu
vāpperāṭu Eḻupattañcu Ivaṉe tiru
veṅkaṭanilaikku vaitta tirinontāviḷak
ku Oṉṟiṉukku nicatam Āḻākku ney meṟ
paṭi Erivatāka viṭṭa Āṭu Irupattai
ñcu Āka Āṭu nūṟum pariṭaiccavaiyārkku
kāṭṭik kuṭuttaṉa .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 1, no. 49 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
